headline: 2 Reasons to Watch MO and 1 to Stay Cautious
summary: Over the past six months, Altria has been a great trade, beating the S&P 500 by 12.6%. Its stock price has climbed to $69.21, representing a healthy 20.3% increase. This was partly thanks to its solid quarterly results, and the performance may have investors wondering how to approach the situation.
